item.title: Music Industry Summer Camp - 07/12/2026 3:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 231 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at the 27th annual Tiffin University Music Industry Summer Camp and enjoy a total creative experience in writing, performing and recording rock, pop, jazz, r&b, a cappella, hip hop and other commercial styles! You’ll also work with industry professionals on how to succeed as an independent artist and music entrepreneur! With lots of individual attention and working in small ensembles and production teams, campers each take the lead in the creation of original pop, rock, r&b and hip hop music, a cappella arrangements, and solo and group performances. Campers perform in rock, pop, hip hop and indie bands and vocal groups, receive private instruction and solo coachings, participate in workshops on songwriting, beatboxing, live looping, studio recording and production, arranging, live sound engineering, and other topics key to success on stage and in the studio. You’ll collaboratively work with professional artists-in-residence to create and record original music together. You’ll engage in co-writing activities with fellow campers and pro songwriters, and then you’ll work with a professional producer in the recording and mixing of your songs. Camp ends on Thursday evening with a public in-person and live-streamed performance of what we’ve created together! The camp is open to all high school and college students, as well as amateur and professional musicians and educators!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Music Industry Summer Camp on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin university and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Dine to Donate for CASA of SSW - 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 69 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Save yourself from the "What's for dinner?" debate!

Skip the meal planning, avoid the dishes, and let Heavenly Pizza handle dinner on Wednesday, July 15, from 4–8 PM.

It's a two-for-one: your family gets a delicious meal, and 15% of sales will help CASA of SSW recruit and train volunteers to give a voice to abused and neglected children in our community.

Now that's a dinner decision you can feel good about!
item.dc:creator: CASA of SSW
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dine to Donate for CASA of SSW on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include help children and pizza.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/16/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and local businesses.

item.title: Christmas in July - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin - 07/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Stroll through downtown, enjoy the festive lights, and explore specials, sales, and unique offerings at our local shops and restaurants. Don't miss the exciting Naughty or Nice Scratch-Off Giveaway: make a purchase at participating businesses, get a scratch-off ticket, and see if you're naughty or nice! Naughty? Enter your ticket at the Welcome Center (96 S. Washington St.) for a chance to win Chamber Cash. Nice? Enjoy an exclusive prize, discount, or coupon!

item.title: "Man Made" Art Show, Displayed July 1st-18th - 07/16/2026 9:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

AG’S MAN MADE ART SHOW The Tiffin Art Guild proudly presents the Man Made Art Show, a special exhibit celebrating the creativity, skill, and artistic vision of male artists. Created as a companion exhibit to our popular She Speaks Art Show, this exhibition provides an opportunity for men to share their unique perspectives through painting, drawing, sculpture, photography, woodworking, mixed media, and more. Whether your work is bold and powerful, thoughtful and reflective, or somewhere in between, we invite you to be part of this exciting showcase. Join us as we fill the gallery with original works that inspire conversation, celebrate creativity, and demonstrate that art knows no boundaries. We look forward to showcasing the many ways men create, imagine, and leave their mark through art. Rob Ledwedge President We are grateful to Seneca Caverns for sponsoring!!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Man Made" Art Show, Displayed July 1st-18th on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin art guild and tiffin, ohio.

item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at JAM’s Markets every Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM for a delightful breakfast experience! Stop by 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio, and enjoy a variety of freshly made breakfast and lunch items, including delicious pierogi and artisanal sourdough breads. Our offerings are available while supplies last, so come early to savor these buzzworthy bites!

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/18/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/18/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and interactive experience.

item.title: Cold Case Camp - 07/20/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/23/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA If Law and Order, CSI and NCIS are on regular rotation and science has become a guilty pleasure, it is time to take it to the next level with Tiffin University Cold Case Camp. TU’s Cold Case Camp is an immersive camp that will acquaint high school students with cold case work and introduce them to the many concepts involved in the solving of cold cases. Students will be exposed to both mock and real cold cases in a hands-on capacity. The camp will be led by TU School of Criminal Justice and Social Sciences faculty and professionals experienced in conducting criminal investigations at all levels.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Cold Case Camp on Jul 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and History & Museums.

item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)

item.title: Craft Creation—Wrap Baskets - 07/22/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/22/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Fort Seneca, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose for an afternoon of basketry.  Please bring a skein of cotton clothesline, your favorite yarn and scissors.   Bring your creativity for a fun-filled hour. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Craft Creation—Wrap Baskets on Jul 22, 2026 in Fort Seneca, OH. Featured themes include yarn and craft creation—wrap baskets.

item.title: "Beginning Needle Felting" Wednesday, July 22, 2026 6pm-9pm #07222601 - 07/22/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/22/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Preregistration is required by Monday, July 20. In this class you will learn about needle felting surfaces, wools and fibers to use, and types of felting needles and when to use them. A finished 4” x 4” felted picture will be completed during class. All supplies are provided. . Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Contact Beth Schweitzer (419-630-3850), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: Roots & Branches Family Art Project - 07/23/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/23/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library invites families to participate in the "Roots & Branches Family Art Project" on Thursday, July 23 at 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This creative, hands-on program encourages families of all ages to explore and share their unique traditions through art. Attendees will create a special project inspired by their favorite customs, holidays, or everyday routines. Join us for an opportunity to make something meaningful together as part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program "Unearth a Story." For more information, call (419) 447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Roots & Branches Family Art Project on Jul 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include art exploration and family art project.

item.title: Christmas in July - 07/24/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/24/2026 11:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 4044 W Township Rd 98, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Get ready for a magical weekend of holiday cheer at The Barn at Seneca Hills in Tiffin! This exciting two-day event is packed with festive fun for the whole family. What to Expect: • Holiday-Themed Activities: Dive into a variety of fun crafts and activities that celebrate the spirit of Christmas. Perfect for kids and adults alike! • Delicious Food Trucks: Savor a wide selection of tasty treats from some of the most popular food trucks in the area. There's something for everyone! • Festive Cocktails: Enjoy a selection of festive cocktails to get you in the holiday spirit! • Live Entertainment: Experience live performances adding to the festive atmosphere! Talent TBA • Holiday Face Painting: Add some excitement with joyful face painting for all ages, allowing everyone to embrace the holiday spirit! • Christmas Movie Under the Stars: Wind down each night with an iconic Christmas movie screening on the lawn. Bring your blankets and enjoy a cozy evening with family and friends. Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity to celebrate the joy of the season in July! Mark your calendars and join us for a weekend filled with laughter, creativity, and holiday spirit.
item.dc:creator: The Barn at Seneca Hills
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Christmas in July on Jul 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and Kids & Family.

item.title: Something Rotten! - 07/24/2026 7:30pm EDT to 07/24/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Music & Lyrics by Karey Kirkpatrick & Wayne Kirkpatrick Book by Karey Kirkpatrick & John O’Farrell July 16, 17, 24, 2027 – 7:30 PM July 25, 2027 – 2:00 PM A Ritz Players Production Almost, Maine is a popular play by John Cariani, a romantic comedy composed of nine interconnected short plays set in the mythical, remote town of Almost, Maine, on a cold winter night. item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/25/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/25/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family friendly and interactive experience.

item.title: Christmas in July - 07/25/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/25/2026 11:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 4044 W Township Rd 98, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Get ready for a magical weekend of holiday cheer at The Barn at Seneca Hills in Tiffin! This exciting two-day event is packed with festive fun for the whole family. What to Expect: • Holiday-Themed Activities: Dive into a variety of fun crafts and activities that celebrate the spirit of Christmas. Perfect for kids and adults alike! • Delicious Food Trucks: Savor a wide selection of tasty treats from some of the most popular food trucks in the area. There's something for everyone! • Festive Cocktails: Enjoy a selection of festive cocktails to get you in the holiday spirit! • Live Entertainment: Experience live performances adding to the festive atmosphere! Talent TBA • Holiday Face Painting: Add some excitement with joyful face painting for all ages, allowing everyone to embrace the holiday spirit! • Christmas Movie Under the Stars: Wind down each night with an iconic Christmas movie screening on the lawn. Bring your blankets and enjoy a cozy evening with family and friends. Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity to celebrate the joy of the season in July! Mark your calendars and join us for a weekend filled with laughter, creativity, and holiday spirit.
item.dc:creator: The Barn at Seneca Hills
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Christmas in July on Jul 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Farmacy Fundamentals - 07/26/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/26/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 194 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Wanting to become more self sufficient? Learn herbalism to help you and yours?

This class takes you from seedling to medicine! Each month, we meet to tend our medicinal garden, learn about the plants themselves, wildcraft wild medicine, harvest and process plants, and make medicine!

Join us for a monthly journey that will teach you fundamentals of growing your own Farmacy! We meet 4th Sundays, 4-6 PM starting in June (through December). Whole series $250, drop-in rate $40 if there are spots left. Class limit 20.

Scholarships are available for those taking the whole course! Please email lily@havenherbs.com if you would like to apply for a scholarship!
item.dc:creator: Haven Herbs
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmacy Fundamentals on Jul 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including gardening and herbalism.

item.title: Farmacy Fundamentals - 07/26/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/26/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Reconnect with the earth and take your health into your own hands. Farmacy Fundamentals is an immersive, in-person, seven-month journey designed to transform your relationship with the plant world. Following the natural rhythm of the seasons, this hands-on class series guides you step-by-step from plotting your first medicinal seeds to stocking your home apothecary with handcrafted remedies. Whether you have a sprawling backyard or a few sunny patio pots, you will learn the ancient art and modern science of growing, tending, harvesting, and crafting your own plant medicine. June – August: Tending the garden and materia medica! As the garden grows, we dive deep into plant profiles and the essentials of botanical care. You will learn how to identify and build relationships with your herbs while exploring the actions, phytochemistry, and energetics of each plant we planted. September – October: Harvest and processing! As the season turns, we focus on reaping what we have sown. Learn the best practices for harvesting herbs at their peak potency. We will cover techniques for washing, drying, garbling, and storing plant material to ensure it remains effective throughout the year. November – December: The home apothecary! In the final months, we transform our processed harvest into potent remedies. This period is dedicated to the craft of medicine making, where you will learn to create tinctures, salves, infused oils, and syrups to support wellness through the winter months. Investment and Registration Space is limited to 20 students to ensure an intimate, hands-on learning environment. Full Season Pre-Registration: $250 Commit to the full seasonal cycle for a discounted rate. This secures your spot in all seven classes and provides the most comprehensive experience. Link below for full series registration. If you are in need of a scholarship, there are some available, just contact Lily for details. Scholarships are available for those taking the full series. Drop-In Rate: $40 per class Available on a first-come, first-served basis as space allows. Link for single classes here (indicate which month): https://buy.stripe.com/8x29AU2asgWUcmJ2Usb7y01
item.dc:creator: Franciscan Earth Literacy Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmacy Fundamentals on Jul 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include hands on learning and herbal remedies.

item.title: Anne Wilson with Special guest Band Reeves - 07/29/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/29/2026 10:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 100 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Seneca County Fair is proud to announce Anne Wilson as 2026 concert headliner! Special guest Band Reeves will start the show! Wednesday, July 29, 2026 Gates open at 6pm, starts 7:30pm Track tickets $40, Grandstands $25 Get your tickets online now https://app.fairs.com/e/a21090c7d87f4b46 2022 GMA Dove Award for New Artist of the Year 2023 Top Christian Album - “My Jesus”
item.dc:creator: Seneca County Fair

item.title: Full Moon Hike - 07/29/2026 9:00pm EDT to 07/29/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3362 Infirmary Rd, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose as we walk under the light of the “Buck Moon.”  This walk will last about 1 to 1 ¼ hours and qualifies for the Walking Stick Program.   Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Full Moon Hike on Jul 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include full moon hike and linda rose.

item.title: "Shasta Daisies" Thursday, July 30, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07302601 or #07302602 - 07/30/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/30/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, July 24. Paint "Shasta Daisies" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, July 30 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 8"x16" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Shasta Daisies" Thursday, July 30, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07302601 or #07302602 on Jul 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin art guild and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Seneca County Draft Horse and Pony Show - 07/30/2026 9:30am EDT to 07/30/2026 2:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 100 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The 2026 Draft Horse and Pony Hitch Show is set for Thursday, July 30th starting at 9:30am in front of the grandstands. These folks travel to multiple shows a year to compete for prize money. This is a beautiful show to watch, has the team of horses must work and move together to be in unison with each other step by step. It’s definitely something you don’t want to miss!
item.dc:creator: Seneca County Fair
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca County Draft Horse and Pony Show on Jul 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seneca county fair and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: 2026 Walter A. Daniel, MD Memorial Golf Outing - 08/03/2026 8:00am EDT to 08/03/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 4399 OH-231, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Mercy Health Foundation is hosting it's 35th Annual Walter A. Daniel, MD Memorial Golf Outing, in support of Mercy Health - Tiffin & Willard Hospitals, will take place on Monday, August 3rd at Mohawk Golf & Country Club. It is a full day of fun and golf!

8:00 a.m - Registration/Driving Range Open

8:45 a.m. - Opening Announcements

9:00 a.m. - Tee Time

For sponsorship and recognition opportunities, please visit tinyurl.com/TiffinWillardGolf2026 to secure your spot!

For any questions about the event, please contact Jace Abel, Special Events Coordinator, at jabel@mercy.com or (567) 938-9429.

Dr. Walter A. Daniel was instrumental in establishing the Mercy Health Foundation — Tiffin in December of 1985. His outstanding dedication to rural health care will always be remembered. His example of philanthropy through leadership and generosity continues to thrive through the Mercy Health Foundation in the Tiffin and Willard communities and beyond. We honor his memory through the naming of this annual tournament that provides a time for fellowship as well as philanthropy.

Note of appreciation - The Leadership and associates of the Mercy Health — Tiffin and Willard Hospitals express sincere gratitude for your participation in the Walter A. Daniel, MD Memorial Golf Outing. We treasure your continuous support of Mercy Health and are committed to providing excellent health care to the Tiffin and Willard communities.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health Foundation

item.title: Make it at Home: Candle Wax Painting - 08/03/2026 9:30am EDT to 08/03/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to decorate a candle with wax beginning Monday, August 3. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to decorate the candle will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/augustmakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join our Financial Counselor Rusti Claydon for Financial Fitness Friday, a new monthly event for our membership for FREE walk-in assistance and education surrounding your financial concerns! item.title: Loud Fest 2026 - 08/07/2026 7:00pm EDT to 08/08/2026 11:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

LOUD FEST OHIO IS BACK! AND IT'S BIGGER THAN EVER!

August 7–8, 2026 | Start Tiffin Fraternal Order of Eagles #402

Tiffin, Ohio — The ride that FIGHTS BACK.

Two days. Hundreds of bikes. One mission that matters more than all of it.

Every dollar raised goes directly to FACT — Financial Assistance for Cancer Treatment in Seneca County — putting real money in the hands of real people fighting the hardest battle of their lives. This isn't a party with a cause. This IS the cause. The party is just how we show up for it.

FRIDAY, AUGUST 7 — WARM UP NIGHT

Live Music 7PM–11PM | Band: Seventy80

Come early. Stay late. Get loud.

SATURDAY, AUGUST 8 — POKER RUN DAY

Registration: 10:30AM – Noon

Kickstands Up: Noon

Sound Logic: 1–4PM

Car Show: 1–4PM (All bikes & classic cars welcome)

Tim & Liz: 7–11PM

POKER RUN STOPS:

START/END — Tiffin Eagles 402

Stop 1 — Route 30 Harley-Davidson, Upper Sandusky

Stop 2 — Tavern 19

Stop 3 — Bellevue Eagles

Stop 4 — TBD

Stop 5 — Fostoria Eagles (pending)

REGISTRATION

Riders: $25 | Couples: $40

THANK YOU TO OUR 2026 SPONSORS:

Seneca Home Improvements • Steinmetz Signs and Graphic Ink • Arnold Vending • Waters Construction • Norwalk Concrete

You don't have to fight cancer alone in Seneca County — because WE ride for you.

Learn more about FACT: factsenecacounty.org
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Eagles #402
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Loud Fest 2026 on Aug 7, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and car show.

Paint "Panda" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Saturday, August 8 from 9am until 12 pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. item.title: Mocktails (Wednesday August 12, 6:30-8) - 08/12/2026 6:30pm EDT to 08/12/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA If your sober-curious or alcohol-free hosting game needs an upgrade or if you are still serving your guests tap water, sugary soda, or a glass of plain cranberry juice, we need to have an intervention. You deserve better, your guests deserve better, and your morning-after energy definitely deserves better. Welcome to Herbal Mocktail Camp, a masterclass for non-drinkers, designated drivers, health-conscious folk, and anyone who wants to sip something sophisticated without the buzz. We are stripping away the boring wellness lectures and replacing them with plant magic, liquid alchemy, and a healthy dose of sass.

item.title: Nonprofit Leadership Alliance | Advocacy in Action: Engaging Local Leaders - 08/14/2026 11:00am EDT to 08/14/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Gillmor Student Center, 190 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development and United Way of North Central Ohio for the third Nonprofit Leadership Alliance quarterly meeting of 2026 on Friday, August 14 at 11 AM, hosted at Osceola Theatre at Tiffin University. This session is designed for nonprofit leaders, staff, and board members who want to better understand local decision-making and strengthen their ability to advocate for their organizations and the communities they serve. The featured topic, “Advocacy in Action: Engaging Local Leaders,” will bring together local and state leaders for a moderated discussion focused on public priorities, community challenges, and opportunities for collaboration with the nonprofit sector. Attendees will gain insight into how decisions are made and how nonprofits can effectively engage with elected officials and public leaders. The second half of the session will offer an interactive opportunity for nonprofit attendees to connect directly with the panelists—asking questions, sharing challenges, and practicing advocacy in a supportive, relationship-focused setting. These meetings are free and open to all nonprofit employees and board members in Seneca County. Chamber & Development membership is not required. Take advantage of this opportunity to build relationships, strengthen your advocacy skills, and engage directly with local leaders. Register now to secure your spot!
item.dc:creator: United Way of North Central Ohio

item.title: Nonprofit Leadership Alliance | Advocacy in Action: Engaging Local Leaders - 08/14/2026 11:00am EDT to 08/14/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Gillmor Student Center, 190 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development and United Way of North Central Ohio for the third Nonprofit Leadership Alliance quarterly meeting of 2026 on Friday, August 14 at 11 AM, hosted at Osceola Theatre at Tiffin University. This session is designed for nonprofit leaders, staff, and board members who want to better understand local decision-making and strengthen their ability to advocate for their organizations and the communities they serve. The featured topic, “Advocacy in Action: Engaging Local Leaders,” will bring together local and state leaders for a moderated discussion focused on public priorities, community challenges, and opportunities for collaboration with the nonprofit sector. Attendees will gain insight into how decisions are made and how nonprofits can effectively engage with elected officials and public leaders. The second half of the session will offer an interactive opportunity for nonprofit attendees to connect directly with the panelists—asking questions, sharing challenges, and practicing advocacy in a supportive, relationship-focused setting. These meetings are free and open to all nonprofit employees and board members in Seneca County. Chamber & Development membership is not required. Take advantage of this opportunity to build relationships, strengthen your advocacy skills, and engage directly with local leaders. Register now to secure your spot!

item.title: End Human Trafficking - 08/14/2026 1:00pm EDT to 08/14/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The "End Human Trafficking" initiative focuses on raising awareness, providing education, and promoting action to combat human trafficking. Through dedicated efforts, it seeks to inform the public about the realities of trafficking, educate individuals on how to recognize and prevent it, and mobilize communities to take meaningful steps toward eradicating this grave issue.
